case_title: AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. VS. RYAN JAPSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAPSON, RYAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 8 LOCKSLEY AVENUE #4M, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JAPSON, RYAN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JAPSON, RYAN

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JAPSON, RYAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JAPSON, RYAN

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JAPSON, RYAN
